'''wafate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:oncogenetically|oncogenetically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-f-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oncogenetically|oncogenetically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wafate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:wafate|wafate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafatesher|wafatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafatesherĂ«m|wafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafatero|wafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafateshĂ«|wafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafateshĂ«m|wafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafatero|gokiwafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafateshĂ«|gokiwafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafateshĂ«m|gokiwafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafankerom|gowafankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafankeshĂ«|gowafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafankeshĂ«m|gowafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafankeya|gowafankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafaterom|wafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafatemu|wafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafateya|wafateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafaterom|gokiwafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafatemu|gokiwafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafateya|gokiwafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafafate|wafafate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafafatesher|wafafatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafafatesherĂ«m|wafafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafafatero|wafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafafateshĂ«|wafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafafateshĂ«m|wafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafafatero|gokiwafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafafateshĂ«|gokiwafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafafateshĂ«m|gokiwafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafafankerom|gowafafankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafafankeshĂ«|gowafafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafafankeshĂ«m|gowafafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafafankeya|gowafafankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafafaterom|wafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafafatemu|wafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafafateya|wafafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafafaterom|gokiwafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafafatemu|gokiwafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafafateya|gokiwafafateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠfĂŠte|wĂŠfĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠfĂŠtesher|wĂŠfĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠfĂŠtero|wĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠfĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠfĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠfĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠfĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠfĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠfĂŠterom|wĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠfĂŠtemu|wĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠfĂŠteya|wĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠfĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠfĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠfĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafafte|wafafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafaftesher|wafaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafaftesherĂ«m|wafaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafaftero|wafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafafteshĂ«|wafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafafteshĂ«m|wafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafaftero|gokiwafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafafteshĂ«|gokiwafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafafteshĂ«m|gokiwafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafafnkerom|gowafafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafafnkeshĂ«|gowafafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafafnkeshĂ«m|gowafafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafafnkeya|gowafafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafafterom|wafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafaftemu|wafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafafteya|wafafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafafterom|gokiwafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafaftemu|gokiwafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafafteya|gokiwafafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
